title.en: Surgical instruments - Non-cutting, articulated instruments - General requirements and test methods
title.zh: 手术器械 - 非切割、铰接器械 - 通用要求和试验方法

standards.abstract: Specifies general requirements and corresponding test methods for a general range of non-cutting articulated instruments in surgery. Edition 3, replaces ISO 7151:1988.
standards.scope: Non-cutting articulated surgical instruments (forceps, clamps, needle holders, etc.).

title.en: Surgical and dental hand instruments - Determination of resistance against autoclaving, corrosion and thermal exposure
title.zh: 外科和牙科手持器械 - 耐高压灭菌、耐腐蚀和耐热性能的测定

standards.abstract: Describes test methods to determine the resistance of stainless steel surgical and dental hand instruments against autoclaving, corrosion and thermal exposure. Edition 2, replaces ISO 13402:1995.
standards.scope: Corrosion and autoclaving resistance testing for surgical/dental hand instruments.

title.zh: 手术器械 - 材料 - 第1部分：金属

standards.abstract: Specifies metals commonly used to manufacture various types of standard surgical instruments, including those used in general surgery, orthopaedics and dentistry. Confirmed in 2022.
standards.scope: Metallic materials for surgical instruments manufacture.

title.en: Surgical instruments - Scalpels with detachable blades - Fitting dimensions
title.zh: 手术器械 - 可拆卸刀片手术刀 - 配合尺寸

standards.abstract: Specifies the fitting dimensions for scalpel handles and their detachable blades to ensure interchangeability. Edition 4, replaces ISO 7740:1985.
standards.scope: Dimensional interchangeability of scalpel handles and detachable blades.
standards.title_en: Instruments for surgery - Scalpels with detachable blades - Fitting dimensions
standards.title_zh: 外科器械 - 可拆卸刀片手术刀 - 配合尺寸

title.en: Prosthetics and orthotics - External orthoses and orthotic components - Part 1: Uses, functions, classification and description of lower limb orthoses
title.zh: 假肢和矫形器 - 外部矫形器和矫形器组件 - 第1部分：下肢矫形器的用途、功能、分类和描述

standards.abstract: Establishes a categorization system and a method of describing external orthoses and orthotic components. Confirmed in 2023.
standards.scope: Classification and description of external orthopaedic orthoses.

title.en: Systems for evacuation of plume generated by medical devices
title.zh: 医疗器械产生的烟雾排放系统

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements and guidelines for systems and equipment used to evacuate plume generated by medical devices during surgical procedures, including endoscopic and minimally invasive procedures. Edition 2.
standards.scope: Plume evacuation systems for electrosurgery, laser surgery, and endoscopic procedures.

title.en: Implants for surgery - Malleable wires for use as sutures and other surgical applications
title.zh: 外科植入物 - 用作缝合线和其他外科应用的可延展金属丝

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for malleable metallic wires intended for use as sutures and in other surgical applications. Confirmed 2020.
standards.title_en: Implants for surgery - Malleable wires for use as sutures and other surgical applications
standards.title_zh: 外科植入物 - 用于缝合和其他外科应用的可延展金属丝
